themes.theme_summary: The overarching theme of these reviews is the poor customer support and technical issues with the app, leading to a frustrating experience for users. This has resulted in a loss of trust and loyalty towards the app.
quotes: pathetic app pathetic customer care service
Customer support is disappointing
Support agents often ignore concerns and act as if they are always right
action_ideas: Improve customer support responsiveness and resolution rates
Address technical issues such as glitches and inaccurate charts
Enhance user interface and experience to reduce frustration

themes.theme_summary: Users are unhappy with the high brokerage charges levied by the app, feeling it eats into their profits and makes the experience less desirable. This sentiment is widespread and affects user satisfaction and trust in the platform.
quotes: 20 rupiya profit hoga toh dalali charge 18 rupiya 20-18=2 apke hat me dalali charge bohat jiyada hai
nice app but brokerage charger jasti hai
high brokerage charge
action_ideas: Review and adjust the brokerage charge structure to be more competitive and transparent
Consider offering tiered pricing or discounts for frequent traders to alleviate the burden of high charges
Improve communication around charges, ensuring users understand what they are paying for and why

themes.theme_summary: The reviews express a mix of positive and negative sentiments about the trading app, with some users finding it useful for beginners and others criticizing its limitations and potential for overtrading. The app's suitability and quality are debated among users.
quotes: This app is only for beginners I mean only beginners use this aap but please stop using this aap in your starting journey
you will not get proper info about your trade
very nice AAP
action_ideas: Improve the app's features to cater to advanced users and prevent overtrading
Enhance the user interface for easier handling and control
Provide more detailed information about trades to address user concerns

themes.theme_summary: Users are seeking improvements and transparency in the mutual fund investment process, including better expense ratio displays and more control over investment options. They also express concerns over unexpected charges and the transition to demat mode.
quotes: Can you please release an option where I can order a reedem call on Mutual fund on a specific NAV
They did not provide any proper document or report explaining the charges
You need to urgently display the base expense ratio (BER) for better context
action_ideas: Add an option for users to order a redeem call on mutual funds based on a specific NAV
Display the base expense ratio (BER) for mutual funds to provide better context
Review and improve the transparency of charges and fees associated with mutual fund investments

themes.theme_summary: Users are expressing overall satisfaction with the app, highlighting its niceness, safety, and positive experience. The reviews indicate a strong positive sentiment towards the app's performance and features.
quotes: very nice trading app
Nice safe app
very nice plateform in limited charges
action_ideas: Continue to prioritize user experience and safety in future updates
Leverage the positive sentiment in marketing campaigns to attract new users
Gather more specific feedback to identify areas for further improvement

themes.theme_summary: The overarching theme of these reviews is the ease of use and user interface of the app, with many users praising its simplicity and beginner-friendliness, but some criticizing recent changes that have made it more confusing. The core issue is the need to balance simplicity with feature richness.
quotes: Earlier, the UI was much simpler and more user-friendly
Please add a toggle to hide F&O and Loan tabs
very simple to use
action_ideas: Simplify the UI by allowing users to customize their dashboard and hide unused tabs
Revert recent design changes that have made financial analysis more confusing
Conduct user testing to identify areas where the app can be made more intuitive for beginners

themes.theme_summary: Users are experiencing various usability issues with the app, including lagging interfaces, difficulties with updating features, and unhelpful customer support. These issues are leading to frustration and a desire to switch to alternative apps.
quotes: apart from being simple and easy to use it is the most useless app in terms of interface lagging problems
I will give it a 5 Star but I am not satisfied because of this i got this message from the groww app help team
coustomer care team is very very rude and irritated to update any things
action_ideas: Optimize the app's interface to reduce lag and improve overall performance
Implement more intuitive and user-friendly features for updating and editing existing settings, such as SIP amounts
Improve customer support by providing more helpful and courteous responses to user inquiries

themes.theme_summary: Users are experiencing various performance issues with the app, including lags, errors, and inaccurate data display, which are affecting their trading decisions and overall experience. These issues are causing frustration and hindering the app's usefulness.
quotes: So many lags and errors in showing real-time trades info of sellers and buyers. Can't trade properly due to improper content.
After the latest update, the app isn't working properly. Today's high and today's low prices are showing incorrect data. Please fix this bug ASAP as it affects trading decisions...
pls check the stock prices not showing accurately in the apps. chart highs and lows are being shown incorrectly in high and low section.
action_ideas: Conduct a thorough review of the app's code to identify and fix bugs causing lags and errors
Improve data accuracy and synchronization to ensure real-time trades info and stock prices are displayed correctly
Optimize the app's performance to handle user traffic and market data updates efficiently

themes.theme_summary: The overarching theme of these reviews is the poor performance of the app, including latency issues, hanging, and difficulties with buying and selling orders. This has led to a significant amount of user frustration and disappointment.
quotes: worst trading application. too much latency issues.
after the update of application you are not able to exit tour trade easily as application hang so much...
This application doesn't deserve a single star. News was previously available but it's now disappeared.
action_ideas: Optimize the app's performance to reduce latency and hanging issues
Improve the order execution process to prevent discrepancies in market rates
Reconsider the recent update and restore previously available features such as news

themes.theme_summary: Users are experiencing problems with the app's order execution, including auto-triggered orders, price discrepancies, and slow execution speeds, leading to significant losses. These issues are causing frustration and mistrust among users.
quotes: orders auto triggered even when price is near but not engaged with your limit price
there is a consistent price gap of ₹2-₹3 between the price I order at and the price I get
They took my limit order and treated it as a market order, and the stop loss hit too quickly
action_ideas: Improve order execution algorithms to reduce slippage and ensure accurate pricing
Enhance the app's user interface to provide clearer order placement and tracking processes
Increase transparency and responsiveness of customer support to address user concerns

themes.theme_summary: The reviews express a mix of positive and negative sentiments about the trading app, with some users praising its ease of use and profitability, while others criticize its suitability for professional trading and express concerns about the fairness of the market. Overall, the theme revolves around the users' experiences and perceptions of the app's trading capabilities.
quotes: best trading app I have earned 4 lakh from this app thank you
Indian Stock Market is fully trap by Institutions, for retail traders, we will not win against them
do not choose it for your trading profession it is not a good broker
action_ideas: Improve the app's features and tools to better support professional traders
Enhance transparency and education about the market and trading practices to address user concerns
Optimize the app's user interface and experience to make it more intuitive and user-friendly for all types of traders

themes.theme_summary: The overarching theme of these reviews is the unreliability and untrustworthiness of the app, with many users experiencing bugs, slow service, and difficulties with withdrawals. This has led to a loss of trust and frustration among users.
quotes: wrosen than worsen app seen i use groww since long but i observe that now too much bug in app i lost more since deu to this
don't use it if you want your money to be safe..this app lags too much ,they charge High but app and it's customer support is pathetic
nice app but withdraw is very slow
action_ideas: Conduct a thorough review of the app's infrastructure to identify and fix bugs and performance issues
Improve the withdrawal process to make it faster and more reliable
Enhance customer support to better address user concerns and issues

themes.theme_summary: Users overwhelmingly praise the app as the best for trading and options, citing its beginner-friendly nature and trustworthiness. The core sentiment is one of high satisfaction and appreciation for the app's services.

Best application for treding and options treading fast n accurate
This is the best application to give best service to the traders.
